name: easypost
description: Reads and writes EasyPost shipping resources including shipments, trackers, addresses, parcels, batches, events, claims, pickups, refunds, scan forms, end shippers, users, and webhooks through the EasyPost REST API.

risk.read: external EasyPost API read of shipping, tracking, carrier metadata/account, event, claim, pickup, refund, scan-form, user, referral customer, and webhook data
risk.write: external EasyPost API mutation of live shipping objects, labels, pickups, insurance/refund workflows, reports, users, and webhooks; buy/refund/insurance/pickup/order/Luma actions may incur charges or alter operational shipping state
risk.approval: reverse ETL plan preview and approval required for every write action; charge-bearing/destructive actions are flagged in writes.json
